all_canonical_docs_rule: All canonical documents under /home/manandakrishna/myprojects/unifyplane/unifyplane-dev/docs/canonical are source-of-truth inputs. UI, routes, metadata, and page templates must derive from them and must not redefine canonical meaning.

G0_1_fail_closed_phase_progression.rule: Any failed phase validation halts the plan. No continuation to next phase until fix is applied and approval is recorded.

G0_2_canonical_content_priority.rule: Canonical markdown documents are the only source of content truth. Implementation must never outrun or contradict canonical documents.

G0_3_static_first_delivery.rule: Default to static generation and Server Components. Client Components allowed only for necessary interaction islands.

G0_4_performance_budget_required.rule: Every phase must preserve text-first rendering, low JavaScript cost, and mobile-first performance.

G0_6_human_approval_gate.rule: After each phase, evidence must be reviewed and approved manually before the next phase begins.

G0_7_mobile_first_and_seo_first.rule: All routes, layouts, templates, and metadata must be mobile optimized, indexable, and semantically structured from the first implementation pass.

core_web_vitals_targets.LCP: low LCP target with immediate text-first rendering
core_web_vitals_targets.INP: low INP target with minimal client-side interaction cost

delivery_constraints: static generation for all canonical pages
no heavy animation or carousel above the fold

primary_audience: assurance, audit, and control-oriented technical readers
security assurance and security architecture readers
senior engineering, platform, and technical-governance readers
secondary_audience_handling: serve through supporting content where relevant
use Writing for broader audience reach
do not allow secondary audiences to dominate navigation or first-contact language
ux_principles: serious documentation feel rather than product marketing

seo_and_indexing_model.page_intent_rule: Each route must own one primary search and reading intent.
internal_linking_model: link pages according to governing chain
cluster narrative, operational, and foundation pages semantically

project_structure.rendering_model: Server Components by default, static generation for all canonical routes

evidence_storage.failure_rule: On failure, create phaseXa subfolder with failure_report.json, root_cause.md, recommendation.md, then stop.

implementation_phases.name: Canonical content inventory and schema
implementation_phases.objective: Establish the canonical markdown inventory, frontmatter schema, content taxonomy, and route mapping derived from the IA and all canonical documents.
test_cases: all canonical files are discoverable under docs/canonical
required route pages map cleanly to canonical documents

implementation_phases.name: Next.js application skeleton
implementation_phases.objective: Create the Next.js App Router project skeleton with root layout, section layouts, TypeScript, linting, and static route shells.
test_cases: static route shells compile without runtime errors
validation: route shells match canonical route map

implementation_phases.name: Markdown ingestion and rendering pipeline
implementation_phases.objective: Implement markdown loading, parsing, heading extraction, TOC generation, and server-side content rendering.
test_cases: canonical site pages render from markdown

implementation_phases.name: Global IA shell and navigation
implementation_phases.objective: Implement header, footer, primary navigation, mobile navigation, section navigation, and IA-consistent page hierarchy.
test_cases: mobile nav is usable and accessible
active state and hierarchy are visible
validation: navigation labels align to canonical IA
mobile navigation works without heavy client cost

implementation_phases.name: Homepage implementation
implementation_phases.objective: Implement the homepage for <3 second hero signal and <10 second first-pass section comprehension.
test_cases: no layout shift in the first viewport
validation: home summarizes and routes rather than over-owning content
AI, safety, and security are visible but not dominant

implementation_phases.name: Core narrative and trust pages
implementation_phases.objective: Implement What is UnifyPlane, Why it matters, Current Readiness, and Evidence as distinct canonical pages with no duplication drift.
test_cases: each route renders from canonical markdown
validation: definition, problem, readiness, and evidence roles remain separate
current truth and future direction are separated clearly

implementation_phases.name: Components layer
implementation_phases.objective: Implement components landing page plus UnifyPlane Core, Agent Runtime, and Inspect Repo pages.
test_cases: agent-runtime reads clearly as bounded AI-agent runtime
validation: unifyplane-core is visibly strongest current component
agent-runtime and inspect-repo are presented as real but earlier

implementation_phases.name: Foundations layer
implementation_phases.objective: Implement Foundations landing plus Continuity, Proof, Drift, Evidence, Change, and Impact pages.
test_cases: foundation pages render from canonical markdown
readability remains strong on mobile and desktop
Continuity appears clearly as conceptual center
validation: foundations stay secondary to top-layer problem/definition/truth pages
foundation pages remain grounded in current canon
future direction does not overrun current maturity

implementation_phases.name: Performance, accessibility, and mobile hardening
implementation_phases.objective: Optimize for Core Web Vitals, accessibility, low-JS delivery, and clean mobile reading.
validation: mobile navigation and TOC remain usable

implementation_phases.name: SEO, indexing, and release hardening
implementation_phases.objective: Finalize indexing-safe metadata, sitemaps, robots policy, structured internal linking, analytics hooks, and production readiness.
test_cases: all indexable routes appear in sitemap
metadata complete for all release routes
internal links and breadcrumbs are valid
validation: indexing model aligns to page intent
release routes are coherent and complete

on_failure: wait for human approval before retry
failure_handling.retry_rule: Retry requires fix applied, human approval, and new sub-phase folder phaseXa.
